title: Mark's Spooky Scary Halloween
description: Ever wanted to feel uneasy while playing Minecraft in single player or with friends? well now you can with these mods neatly packaged for You, your friends, and your family can get chills down their spine.
body:
This mod pack was originally going to be made for Me and my friends as a Halloween multiplayer challenge inspired by Calvin's From the Fog series but now it's for the public to play. Make sure you watch your back and maintain your sanity you don't want to know what happens when your sanity drains. Did I forget to mention a few well known fellows is stalking you as well? No? Well now you know Happy Halloween everyone. To set the mood play this in the background (https://open.spotify.com/playlist/70u34Pm4T5WbQG3ptt39li?si=65dd32e34336460a). Make sure to keep your brightness to zero and turn the music off if you don't like it I won't judge. To activate/de-active shaders press k but to activate them in the first place go to the options menu and look for the shaders pack button in the top right and click on it.


Warning: This modpack contains the following. Loud noises, scary sounds, jumpscares, unsettling creatures, and other things to make you feel uneasy. If you can't handle those or have health problems that this modpack may make your condition worsen DO. NOT. PLAY. THIS. MODPACK. In the meantime for those who don't care or are not effected enjoy.
